description: Students provide examples of attendance, punctuality, and reliability, then write statements demonstrating workplace readiness.

rubric.description: Student provides three clear, specific examples of good attendance.
Student writes a clear, professional attendance statement suitable for an interview.
Student provides three specific examples demonstrating punctuality.
Student writes a clear, professional punctuality statement.
Student provides three examples demonstrating reliability.
Student writes a clear reliability statement showing workplace readiness.

aiPrompt: You are an employment readiness grader. Evaluate the student's attendance, punctuality, and reliability examples and statements. Score each rubric category based on clarity, specificity, and professionalism. Provide a suggested total score out of 60. Then generate 3–5 suggested comments the teacher may choose from. Comments should be supportive, specific, and written in a professional tone. Do not overwrite the teacher's authority; only suggest.
suggestedComments: Your attendance examples show strong responsibility and commitment.
Your punctuality statement is clear and demonstrates good time management.
Your reliability examples show initiative and willingness to support others.
Consider adding more detail to strengthen your examples.
Your statements would impress an employer in an interview setting.
